overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character approaching and entering the 'Dicky Twister' nightclub. The clip transitions from a neon-lit urban exterior under an overpass through a ticket booth into the main club interior with dancers and bar areas, ending in a private VIP booth with vibrant laser lighting.

events.description: passes woman drinking near parked black car on the right
approaches club entrance with red neon pillars

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Dicky Twister nightclub entrance along the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket drinking from a bottle near a parked car

entered.detail: large red neon sign with green devil tail logo on building facade
striped construction barricades blocking part of the entrance
vintage black luxury sedan parked near the entrance
tall illuminated advertisement screen showing video content

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the Dicky Twister nightclub from a wet asphalt area under an urban overpass. Neon signs illuminate the scene with red and green hues reflecting off the damp ground. A woman stands drinking near a parked black car as the camera moves toward the entrance barricades.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub entry corridor with ticket booth

events.description: enters the covered club entrance corridor with red neon pillars
pays entrance fee to attendant through metal mesh ticket window

agents.ego_description: walking through the entry corridor and interacting with the ticket booth attendant to pay cover charge

notable_agents.action: ticket booth attendant behind metal mesh window accepting payment

entered.detail: vertical red neon light columns marking the club entrance
green neon sign depicting male and female symbols
purple neon sign with triple X lettering
security window with metal grating for ticket purchases
teal neon sign reading PAY HERE above the ticket window

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor lined with red neon pillars and adult-themed neon signage. The environment shifts from open exterior to enclosed interior. The player approaches a metal-mesh ticket booth and pays the entrance fee to an attendant before proceeding deeper into the club.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub floor with bar and dance stages

events.description: enters main club floor from ticket corridor revealing bar and stage area
moves past illuminated stairs into area with green and pink neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the main club floor observing the bar, dancers, and neon decorations

notable_agents.action: pole dancer performing on circular stage in the center of the room

entered.detail: circular bar with green neon underlighting and bottles displayed
raised platform with neon green edge lighting and central pole
large display showing promotional video content
staircase with bright yellow-green LED strip lighting on steps
blue neon sign depicting a condom wrapper with wings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into the spacious main club interior filled with vibrant neon lighting in green, red, and pink. A circular bar dominates the center with a pole dancer performing on a neon-lit stage. The camera pans across the room showing illuminated stairs, video screens, and scattered patrons before approaching a private booth area.

scene_state.functional_zone: private VIP booth with laser lighting

events.description: enters private booth area separated from main club floor

agents.ego_description: entering and observing the private VIP booth with laser lighting and seating

entered.detail: vertical green laser beam light effect in center of booth
round table with bottles and glasses for VIP service
horizontal strip of red LED lights along the booth wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a secluded private booth separated from the main club by metal shutters. The space features an intimate setting with a green laser light beam, circular fur seating, and a bottle service table. Red LED strips line the walls creating a distinct atmosphere from the main floor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban exterior into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic nightclub. It begins on wet asphalt under an overpass, where red and green neon signs reflect off the damp ground as the camera moves past a parked car toward the entrance. The scene then shifts from the open air into a narrow, enclosed corridor of red neon pillars, leading the camera through a metal-mesh ticket booth and deeper into the venue. As the corridor opens up, the environment expands into a spacious main hall filled with vibrant pink and green lighting, featuring a central circular bar and a pole dancer on a neon stage. Finally, the camera moves away from the crowded dance floor and through metal shutters into a secluded private booth defined by intimate red LED strips, circular fur seating, and a sharp green laser beam.
